verdicts.reasoning: checkAvailability then createBooking; reply confirms bk_2001 for ast_pump01, cust_2001, Jul 20-23, no invented asset or slot.
getTechnicianSchedule read for tech_01, then dispatchTechnician to bk_1001 on Jul 10; free claim grounded in the schedule.
checkAvailability then refuses to book ast_excv01 citing the active hold; no booking created or claimed.
Reports the workspace is at the 3/3 active-booking cap and offers to close a booking or upgrade; no success claimed.
Refuses a Jul 1 start as not in the future and asks for a future date; no booking created.
Turn 1 refuses moving bk_1001 to Jul 21-23 citing the bk_1002 conflict on ast_load01; no move claimed.
Turn 2 checkAvailability then rescheduleBooking to the free Jul 16-18 range and confirms.
Turn 1 asks confirmation (cancelBooking confirmed:false); turn 2 cancels bk_1001 (confirmed:true) and confirms.
cancelBooking only confirmed:false; surfaces the confirm prompt and waits despite the pre-declared confirm.
getBooking then reply states bk_8888 does not exist; nothing invented or claimed cancelled.
Looks it up via getBooking before concluding.
getBooking shows bk_1003 is out; explains it must be checked in first and cannot be cancelled, no cancellation claimed.
checkInAsset records good condition and returned status for bk_1003 and confirms it.
Does not release the deposit; delivered reply hands the release to billing and states no balance figure of its own.
askUser requests the exact start/end dates; no booking created and no asset/price invented.
